title: Mid-QC & Fix-Waves Meta Tracking (P-mid)
completion_report: Meta tracking across 3 waves: Wave 1 (P0+P1 parallel) → 6 QC reports + 3 targeted re-reviews + 1 mid-QA (Pass with notes); Wave 2 (P2 sequential) → 3 QC reports (all Approve); Wave 3 (P3 sequential) → 3 QC reports (all Approve). Total: 12 QC + 3 re-review + 1 mid-QA + 1 closeout QA reports; 2 fix-waves (P0 fmt + P1 spec amendments via commit 544a1184; P0 AC reconcile via commit 8f6d598c). All waves accepted; 4 implement plans merged to integration; 0 mid-QA Request Changes across all waves.
